About FIT CONNECT

MORE THAN
A GYM

FIT CONNECT Gym is Hamirpur's most complete fitness destination, located at Naduan Chowk on the Shimla–Kangra Road, Nadaun. Under the expert guidance of Trainer Anuj Thakur, we've been transforming lives across Himachal Pradesh.

Equipped with premium Viva Fitness machines, a professional weights area, cardio zone, spinning bikes, treadmills, and our iconic Hulk mural wall — FIT CONNECT is designed to inspire you every single day.

Whether you want to lose weight, build muscle, tone up, or stay healthy — we have a programme built exactly for you. Men, women, teenagers, seniors — everyone is welcome.

Weekly Training Programme

7-DAY WORKOUT
SCHEDULE

A complete science-backed split covering every muscle group. Click any day to see the full workout with sets, reps & expert tips from Trainer Anuj Thakur.

MONChest + Tri
TUEBack + Bi
WEDLegs + Glutes
THUShoulders
FRIArms + Core
SATHIIT Cardio
SUNRecovery
CHEST &
TRICEPS
Monday
01
Flat Bench Press
4 sets × 10–12 reps | 2 min rest
02
Incline DB Press
3 sets × 12 reps | Upper chest
03
Cable Chest Fly
3 sets × 15 reps | Full contraction
04
Weighted Push-Ups
3 sets × failure | Finisher
05
Tricep Rope Pushdown
4 sets × 15 reps | Cable
06
Skull Crushers
3 sets × 12 reps | EZ-bar
07
OH Tricep Extension
3 sets × 12 reps | Dumbbell
08
Dips
3 sets × failure | Bodyweight
💡 ANUJ'S TIP: Keep elbows at 45° on bench press. Always warm up 10 min. End with a chest stretch — hold 30 sec each side.
BACK &
BICEPS
Tuesday
01
Deadlift
4 sets × 6–8 reps | King lift
02
Barbell Bent-Over Row
4 sets × 10 reps | Thickness
03
Lat Pulldown / Pull-Ups
4 sets × 12 reps | Wide grip
04
Seated Cable Row
3 sets × 12 reps | Mid-back
05
Single-Arm DB Row
3 sets × 12 each side
06
Barbell Curl
4 sets × 12 reps | Slow negatives
07
Hammer Curl
3 sets × 15 reps | Brachialis
08
Concentration Curl
3 sets × 12 reps | Peak squeeze
💡 ANUJ'S TIP: Back flat on deadlifts, chest up, drive through heels. No swinging on bicep curls — control every single rep.
LEGS &
GLUTES
Wednesday
01
Barbell Squat
5 sets × 8–10 reps | Go deep
02
Leg Press
4 sets × 12 reps | High feet = glutes
03
Romanian Deadlift
4 sets × 10 reps | Hamstrings
04
Walking Lunges
3 sets × 20 steps | Dumbbells
05
Leg Extension
3 sets × 15 reps | Quads
06
Leg Curl
3 sets × 15 reps | Hamstrings
07
Hip Thrust
4 sets × 15 reps | Best for glutes
08
Standing Calf Raise
4 sets × 20 reps | Full range
💡 ANUJ'S TIP: Squat below parallel when mobility allows. Hip thrusts are essential for women. Knee pain? Widen stance and reduce depth.
SHOULDER
DAY
Thursday
01
OH Barbell Press
4 sets × 8–10 reps | Standing
02
Seated DB Press
3 sets × 12 reps | Neutral grip
03
Lateral Raises
4 sets × 15 reps | Side delt
04
Front Raises
3 sets × 12 reps | Plate/dumbbell
05
Rear Delt Fly
3 sets × 15 reps | Bent-over
06
Arnold Press
3 sets × 10 reps | Full rotation
07
Face Pulls
3 sets × 15 reps | Cable
08
Shrugs
3 sets × 20 reps | Trap builder
💡 ANUJ'S TIP: Never skip rear delts — they balance posture and prevent injury. Face pulls are gold for shoulder health.
ARMS &
CORE
Friday
01
EZ-Bar Curl
4 sets × 12 reps | Wrist-safe
02
Preacher Curl
3 sets × 12 reps | Peak isolation
03
Incline DB Curl
3 sets × 12 reps | Full stretch
04
Close-Grip Bench
4 sets × 10 reps | Tricep mass
05
Tricep Dip (Bench)
3 sets × 15 reps | Bodyweight
06
Plank
3 sets × 60 sec | Core
07
Cable Crunch
3 sets × 20 reps | Weighted abs
08
Hanging Leg Raise
3 sets × 15 reps | Lower abs
💡 ANUJ'S TIP: Slow controlled reps beat swinging every time. For core — breathe and brace, don't just move.
HIIT &
CARDIO
Saturday
01
Burpees
4 rounds × 15 | 30 sec rest
02
Jump Squats
3 rounds × 12 | Explosive
03
Spinning Bike Intervals
15 min | 45 sec hard / 15 sec easy
04
Treadmill Sprints
10 min | 1 min fast / 30 sec walk
05
Mountain Climbers
3 rounds × 30 sec | Cardio+core
06
Kettlebell Swing
4 rounds × 20 | Hip hinge
07
Battle Ropes
4 rounds × 30 sec | Full power
08
Full Body Stretch
10 min | Hold each 30 sec
💡 ANUJ'S TIP: HIIT burns fat for 24 hrs after training. Use our spinning bikes and treadmills for maximum cardio results at FIT CONNECT.
ACTIVE
RECOVERY
Sunday – Rest
01
Brisk Walk
20–30 min | Outdoors
02
Foam Rolling
15 min | Tight muscles
03
Static Stretching
20 min | Hold 30–45 sec
04
Yoga / Breathing
15 min | Mobility + relax
05
Light Cycling
Optional | 20–30 min easy
06
Meditation
10 min | Mental reset
07
Hydration
3+ litres water + electrolytes
08
Sleep 8 Hours
The #1 recovery tool — non-negotiable
💡 ANUJ'S TIP: Muscles grow on rest days, not training days. Sleep, protein, and recovery = results. Never skip Sunday rest.
Nutrition & Diet Plans

EAT SMART,
TRAIN HARDER

Complete daily meal plans for every goal, every age group, every body type. Designed by Trainer Anuj Thakur based on science-backed nutrition principles.

🎯 Goal: Muscle Gain (Bulking) | ~2800–3200 kcal/day | Protein: 160–200g | Carbs: 350–400g | Fat: 70–90g
Best for lean/thin males wanting to build muscle mass and gain weight.
🌅
6:00 AM · Wake Up
Morning Fuel
  • Banana (2) + Peanut Butter (2 tbsp)370 kcal
  • Full-Fat Milk (1 glass)150 kcal
  • Soaked Almonds (6)45 kcal
🍳
8:30 AM · Breakfast
Power Breakfast
  • Whole Eggs (4) + Egg Whites (2)360 kcal
  • Oats (1 cup cooked)150 kcal
  • Whole Wheat Toast (2) + Juice260 kcal
🍱
1:00 PM · Lunch
Mass Lunch
  • Rice (2 cups) / 4 Chapatis450 kcal
  • Chicken/Paneer (200g) + Dal450 kcal
  • Salad + Curd (1 bowl)120 kcal
⚡
4:30 PM · Pre-Gym
Energy Boost
  • Whey Protein (1 scoop)120 kcal
  • Banana (1) + Mixed Nuts250 kcal
🏋️
7:30 PM · Post-Gym
Recovery Meal
  • Whey Protein (1–2 scoops)240 kcal
  • Sweet Potato/Rice + Ghee (1 tsp)245 kcal
🌙
9:00 PM · Dinner
Night Recovery
  • Chicken/Fish/Paneer (200g)280 kcal
  • Chapati (2) + Sabzi280 kcal
  • Curd or Casein before sleep100 kcal
💧 Water: 3–4L/day. 🚫 Avoid: Junk food, cold drinks, alcohol. ✅ Add: Creatine 3–5g/day. Contact Anuj Thakur 8580500737 for personalised macro plan.
🎯 Goal: Fat Loss (Males) | ~1800–2200 kcal/day | Protein: 160g+ | Carbs: 150–200g | Fat: 50–60g
For overweight males wanting to lose fat while keeping muscle.

Detox Start

Lean Breakfast

  • Oats ¾ cup (water) + Green Tea112 kcal
🍱
1:00 PM · Lunch
High-Protein Lunch
  • Grilled Chicken/Tofu (200g)250 kcal
  • Brown Rice (1 cup) / 2 Chapatis200 kcal
  • Dal + Salad (no oil)160 kcal

4:30 PM · Snack
Pre-Gym Snack
  • Whey Protein (1 scoop, water)120 kcal

7:30 PM · Post-Gym
Recovery

Light Dinner

💧 Water: 4L+/day. ❌ Avoid: Sugar, maida, fried food, cold drinks. ✅ Walk 30 min daily. Contact Anuj: 8580500737 for personalised calorie deficit plan.
🎯 Goal: Toning & Shaping (Females) | ~1600–2000 kcal/day | Protein: 100–130g | Carbs: 180–220g | Fat: 55–70g
For women wanting a lean, toned, fit physique.

Morning Ritual
  • Warm Lemon Honey Water30 kcal

8:00 AM · Breakfast
Balanced Breakfast

Mid-Morning

Balanced Lunch

Sustainable fat loss — NO crash dieting. Steady, consistent results.

Detox Morning

Light Breakfast

Meet Your Coach

TRAINER
ANUJ THAKUR

ANUJ THAKUR
Head Trainer & Fitness Expert · FIT CONNECT Gym

Anuj Thakur is the head trainer and the driving force behind FIT CONNECT Gym in Nadaun, Hamirpur. With years of hands-on experience in strength training, body transformation, and nutrition coaching, Anuj has helped hundreds of people across Himachal Pradesh achieve their fitness goals.

His approach is personal, practical, and results-driven. Whether you are a complete beginner or a seasoned lifter, Anuj tailors every programme to your body, your goals, and your lifestyle.

From weight loss to muscle building, from teenage athletes to senior wellness — Anuj understands what it takes to transform bodies and change lives.
